# [PKT-PRV-059](task-0126): Provider Data Profiling

## Purpose

Implement provider data profiling.

## Scope

- Profile format
- Analysis
- Reporting

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement analysis
3. Add reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Analysis works
3. Reports generated
